description: An inpatient has left the unit without being discharged. A nurse must document this as an elopement.

nodes.task_description: Notify hospital security and the attending physician.

expected_outcome.expected: Nurse follows hospital protocol for a missing patient.

nodes.task_description: Locate the patient's record in the EHR.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct inpatient encounter.

nodes.task_description: Process a 'Discharge - Left Against Medical Advice (AMA)' ADT message with a note indicating elopement.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly updates the patient's status and documents the circumstances of the departure.
